text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What do you want for your birthday? Don't be
shy now, you can ask for anything.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... You say that every year, and you always really mean anything, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I got it! Dia, I want you to keep running with
me, now and forever!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Forever, you say... Hehe. You're being awfully
greedy today, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Really? Y-you think? This is the only thing I'm
asking for though...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but I don't mind. After all, I'm guilty of being
just as greedy as you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: When I heard your request, my first thought was that I wished you'd said "keep running with me every day," you know? ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Every day? You got it! I'd like that too! Can
I change my request real quick?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks, Dia. Every time I need you, you always
rise to the challenge and more.
